name: Pawn1st
description_short: Pawn1st Tucson, Arizona — FirstCash is the leading international pawn operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., Latin America, and UK, buying/sell...
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store operator. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers through a network of retail pawn locations spanning 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). With approximately 22,000 employees worldwide, FirstCash is a publicly traded company included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index.

FirstCash's core business centers on pawn loans secured by pledged personal property—a non-recourse lending product—alongside retail sales of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company also operates a layaway service (with 10% down payments), buys precious metals (gold, silver, platinum), and through its wholly-owned subsidiary AFF, provides lease-to-own and retail finance solutions across 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its massive scale and international presence, operating over 3,300 pawn locations compared to typical regional competitors. The company has integrated technology-driven point-of-sale payment solutions into its operations and maintains significant retail inventory turnover, marketing that "you never know what you'll find on our shelves." Their gold-buying service and layaway programs add revenue diversification beyond traditional pawn lending.

FirstCash is best suited for consumers seeking immediate cash access without credit checks through collateral-based loans, or those looking to buy merchandise at discounted prices. The main caveat is that pawn loans charge interest and require surrendering personal property as security; this is a short-term liquidity solution, not a credit-building product. Borrowers must understand they risk losing pledged items if loans aren't repaid.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America for convenient access
No credit check required—pawn loans based on collateral value, accessible to credit-constrained consumers
Fast cash availability on the spot with non-recourse loans (borrower not personally liable)
Diverse merchandise inventory (electronics, jewelry, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Additional services beyond pawn loans: gold buying, layaway plans (10% down), retail sales
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) with established infrastructure and regulatory oversight
AFF subsidiary provides 15,000+ merchant partner locations for lease-to-own and retail finance options
cons: Pawn loans carry interest charges and require surrendering personal property as security with risk of loss
Interest rates and loan terms not disclosed on website; borrowers must visit stores for specific pricing
Non-recourse protection means company retains collateral but does not prevent credit damage from non-payment
Layaway service requires 10% down and ongoing payments; full terms and interest not detailed online
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers needing immediate funds without credit qualification
People seeking to sell jewelry, electronics, or other merchandise for quick cash
Individuals preferring collateral-based loans over credit-based personal loans
Budget shoppers looking to buy discounted merchandise or use layaway services
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers who need immediate cash and have valuable personal property to pledge as collateral, or those seeking discounted merchandise inventory. The main caveat is that pawn loans charge interest and carry the risk of losing pledged items if not repaid on time; borrowers should understand this is short-term emergency liquidity, not a credit-building solution, and specific rates/terms vary by location.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Gold, silver, and platinum buying services
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Merchandise inventory search and store locator
Lease-to-own financing through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Retail finance payment solutions for consumer goods
